---
title: "VERITAS LUX MEA"
---

## Philosophy Within Me

-   **知之爲知之 不知爲不知 是知也 - Confucius (The Analects 2.17)**

    ```         
    - To know what you know, and to know what you don't know, that is true knowledge.
    ```

-   **You are the light of the world. - Jesus Christ (Mattew 5:14)**

-   **배워서 남 주자! - Korean saying (Modified version)**

    ```         
    - Use what you learn to help others.
    ```

-   **Central Limit Theorem**

$$
\sqrt{n}(\bar{X}_n - \mu) \xrightarrow{d} N(0,\sigma^2)
$$

## AI and Drug Development

### My Recent Research Paper!

![AI Application of Biomedical Knowledge-Graph DB](so_paper.png) <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.csbj.2025.12.035>
